description.zh-Hans: 生成像素艺术UI按钮，支持可配置大小、配色方案和图标叠加。支持正常和按下两种视觉状态。适用于游戏菜单和HUD原型设计。
description.en: Generates pixel art UI buttons with configurable size, color scheme, and icon overlay. Supports normal and pressed visual states. Suitable for game menu and HUD mockups.

triggers.zh-Hans: 按钮, UI按钮, 菜单按钮, 游戏界面, HUD按钮
triggers.en: button, UI button, menu button, game UI, HUD button

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成像素艺术UI按钮，可叠加图标输入，用于游戏菜单和HUD原型。
exampleUsage.en: Generate pixel-art UI buttons with optional icon overlay for game menus and HUD mockups.
